description: Create a scatter plot visualization of the Iris flower dataset using KNIME Analytics Platform. The dataset is at /home/ga/Documents/data/iris.csv (150 real botanical measurements by Edgar Anderson, columns: sepal_length, sepal_width, petal_length, petal_width, species). You are in the KNIME workflow editor with an empty workflow called 'Iris Visualization'. Build a workflow that reads the Iris CSV file, then creates a scatter plot showing sepal_length on the X-axis and petal_length on the Y-axis. Execute the workflow and open the scatter plot to view the visualization.
